task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Rural Farm in Vermont (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1250000.00 and wholesale is $1000000.00. Product features: 50-acre organic farm with 4-bedroom farmhouse and multiple barns. Reference: https://www.landvest.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Rural Farm in Vermont. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Rural Farm in Vermont. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
